level.description:
Level of the block where the message was pushed.  
**[sortable]**

index.description: Index of the inbox message within the block.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the block where the message was pushed.

predecessorHash.description: For `level_info` messages only. Hash of the predecessor block.

predecessorTimestamp.description: For `level_info` messages only. Timestamp of the predecessor block.

initiator.description: For `transfer` messages only. Account, initiated the operation.

sender.description: For `transfer` messages only. Smart contract, sent the internal transaction.

target.description: For `transfer` messages only. Smart rollup to which the internal transaction was sent.

entrypoint.description: For `transfer` messages only. Entrypoint called in the target rollup

parameter.description: For `transfer` messages only. Value passed to the called entrypoint. Note: you can configure parameters format by setting `micheline` query parameter.

payload.description: For `external` messages only. Payload bytes (in base64).

protocol.description: For `migration` messages only. Version of the new protocol (e.g. 'nairobi_017').
